reviewed_actions.ai_reasoning: Strongest candidate on the list: momentum=99, volume=100 — textbook institutional accumulation ahead of an earnings catalyst. Healthcare biotech with extreme volume surge suggests smart money positioning. RSI isn't provided directly but momentum/volume profile fits the pre-earnings accumulation pattern perfectly. Sizing at ~8% given bear regime warrants slight caution, but this is the highest-conviction setup on the board.

Strong momentum=90 in a defensive energy name during a bear regime. Volume=48 is below our 70 threshold which is a concern, but energy has been a relative strength leader and XOM is a mega-cap with solid fundamentals (P/E=25.5, ROE=11.1%). Earnings season catalyst with momentum confirmation. Sizing slightly below standard given volume score miss.

Highest momentum score at 94 among energy names. Gross margin of 73% is excellent for an E&P company. Volume=40 is weak — the main knock — but the momentum profile is strong and it pairs well with XOM for energy sector exposure into earnings. P/E=35.2 is elevated but momentum strategies ride the wave. Smaller position to account for volume concern.

Momentum=90, volatility=71 (highest of the group — favorable for post-earnings moves). Energy trio diversification with XOM and FANG. Volume=43 is again below ideal but the momentum and volatility profile suggest a potential big post-earnings move. Solid balance sheet mega-cap that provides portfolio stability in a bear regime.
